推荐场景: 小型讲座教室｜听懂概念定义
60秒任务: 「定义概念」：定义/背景/例子/结论；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 定义｜结构化说明｜例证｜比较｜结论｜笔记抓取
场景族: 课堂｜研讨室｜讲座｜访谈｜白板说明
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
By ___, I mean ___.（定义术语）
In this context, ___ refers to ___.（限定语境）
A useful way to define ___ is ___.（给出工作定义）
The key idea is ___.（抓住核心概念）
It is not exactly ___; it is more like ___.（区分相近概念）
Let me separate ___ from ___.（概念拆分）
The term can be used in two ways.（说明多义）
The narrow definition focuses on ___.（限定范围）
The broader definition includes ___.（扩展范围）
A simple example would be ___.（用例子解释）
What matters here is ___.（强调重点）
That definition is helpful, but a bit too broad.（评价定义）
Could you give a more precise definition?（请求精确定义）
So the concept has three parts: ___, ___, and ___.（结构化定义）
The speaker is using ___ to mean ___.（理解演讲用法）
Let’s write down the working definition.（笔记抓取）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: concept, term, definition, meaning, scope, feature
Verbs: define, refer to, include, exclude, distinguish, focus on
Adjectives: broad, narrow, precise, vague, useful, central
Connectors: in this context, in other words, more precisely, for example
Chunks: working definition, key idea, broader definition, narrow definition, three parts, used to mean
